title: Lesson 699: 作製, 探る, 囁く...

items.gloss: to feel around for; to fumble for; to grope for; to search for; to look for; to investigate; to probe into; to spy on; to sound out; to explore (parts unknown); to enjoy (natural beauty)
to whisper; to murmur; to rumor; to rumour
to stick into (of something with a sharp point); to prick; to pierce; to get stuck (in); to lodge (in); to resonate emotionally; to move
tatami room; tatami mat room; formal Japanese room; dinner party in a tatami room (esp. when a geisha or maiko attends)
